mnemonics: TRACK: Trends, Reports, Alerts, Capacity, Key metrics
keyPoints: They monitor and report on resource utilization trends over time.
They provide alerts when usage thresholds are breached.
They enable forecasting future capacity needs based on historical data.
commonMistakes: Focusing only on current usage and ignoring historical trends for forecasting.
Setting alert thresholds too low, causing frequent false-positive alarms.
Tracking too many metrics, which creates noise and obscures the important ones.
